view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding processing time between steps.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding processing time between steps.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding processing time between steps.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time between steps (processing time)', but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or checks related to the processing time between the steps of the saga. The existing evidence focuses on the booking process and does not address the timing or gaps between the individual service steps, which is critical for confirming this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of relevant evidence.
